summary: A Go-based monolithic project utilizing MCP handlers and a custom test runner, heavily augmented by AI-agent generated validation tests.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated extra tests (0005-0019) may lead to test bloat and maintenance overhead
Uncommitted modified and staged files in git status indicate potential instability or incomplete work
Heavy reliance on AI-generated tests could mask actual edge cases if not properly curated
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant auto-generated extra tests to reduce CI execution time
Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean working tree
Review AI-generated tests for actual value versus noise, focusing on coverage gaps in core logic
